name: Hunt Together
short_description: Feel the thrill of a hunt in a 1v1 Duel or up to 1v3 Hide and Seek mode that will push your wits, perceptiveness, and courage to their very limits. Employ an array of items, triggers, and skills fit to your class to outsmart and defeat your foe - a terrifying Ghost or a dauntless, vigilant Hunter.
detailed_description:
Challenge your friends in a PvP VR Horror game!


Hunt Together is a multiplayer VR game offering two Player vs Player modes, in which you take on the role of the bold Hunter or the terrifying Ghost. Your task will be to defeat your opponent with the help of numerous skills, items and usable environmental elements 🛠️ The arenas of your battles are spooky, chilling locations, such as an abandoned mine, a haunted mansion or a forgotten orphanage.

In addition to being able to face your friends in the Elimination Mode (1v1) or the Hide and Seek Mode (1v3), you also can acquire new skins for your favorite characters and develop their skills through a progression system.




• Challenge your friends in a spooky horror PvP system with 1v1 and up to 1v3 modes
• Two unique classes with dedicated skills and items
• A suspenseful vibe of psychological horror
• Haunted locations abound with possibilities and usable environment elements
• Skins to customize your favorite character
• Events and updates with new content to the game

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal
*languages with full audio support
